name: Q-1 SPACE config behavior: config declares all five SPACE dimensions as YAML keys (collector dispatch keys)
command: n=0; for k in satisfaction performance activity collaboration efficiency_and_flow; do grep -qE "^  $k:" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/config.yaml" && n=$((n+1)); done; [ "$n" -eq 5 ] && echo all_5 1>&2
